chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D – 670 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) Priority. 1. For order on Office Objection. 2. For order on CMA No.3232 of 2020. 3. For hearing of CMA No.16646 of 2022. 4. For hearing of CMA No.3233 of 2020. 5. For hearing of Main Case. 06-10-2025 Petitioner – Zar Gul – is present in person. Ms. Tatheera Fatima, Advocate for the Respondents 3 to 9. ********** A billing dispute between the Petitioner and the K-Electric [Respondents 3 to 9] was settled before the Wafaqi Mohtasib (Ombudsman) pursuant to order dated 09-10-2018 when the KE offered a 50% rebate on the disputed amount and the Petitioner agreed to pay the same in twelve monthly installments. The Petitioner submits that even so, the KE has not adjusted the electricity bill of the Petitioner. It is apparent that the Petitioner still raises a billing dispute with the KE. The relevant authority to redress his grievance is therefore the Electric Inspector under the Electricity Act, 1910. The Petitioner may approach Electricity Inspector with a copy of this order, who shall look into his complaint and decide the same expeditiously. Petition disposed of in said terms. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
